title: MSR 0.1 — Morpion Solitaire Record
description: Self-describing record for a Morpion Solitaire game. See docs/spec/0.1/msr.md. This schema validates the JSON form (the compact MS1: envelope decompresses to the same JSON).

version.description: Format version, major.minor. "0.1" for this spec (a bare integer is accepted for backward compatibility).

producer.description: Program that wrote the file, e.g. "morpion-solitaire/0.1.0".

available_moves.description: Legal moves available at the final position (0 means terminal).

terminal.description: Whether the final position is terminal.

bbox.description: Bounding box of all placed points: [min_x, min_y, max_x, max_y].

source.description: Where the game originates: a URL or citation (e.g. the original record site or an imported Pentasol file).

transcribed_by.description: Who transcribed the game into MSR form (curator/project), distinct from source and author.

solver.description: Automated-search provenance; present only for solver-produced games.

tool.description: The search tool/engine that produced the game (name or brand, e.g. "morpion-solitaire.io"). Distinct from the file-level producer.

method.description: Algorithm and parameters, e.g. "nrpa L3". Does not restate the seed.

elapsed_secs.description: Wall-clock seconds of the producing search.

pos.description: Index of the new point within the line (0..line_len).
